title: After the Satsuki Sho: You're Strong

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The racers come charging furiously down the
track! Can the pack leader evade their dogged
pursuit?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Haaah...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Oh no, I can already hear the others
approaching. Their acceleration is completely
different to anything I've experienced before!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I want to win.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to win... I need to win... I have to win...
That's all that matters right now!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I won't surrender the crown to anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew... Hey, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: R-Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Ines & Ryan
text_block_list.text: See you at the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You know, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back to the waiting room, Ines Fujin
turns to me, still tentatively cradling her
overheated limbs.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Having everyone's focus on me like that... it felt
completely different from any other race I've
experienced so far.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah. They were on a completely different level.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It might be a heck of a lot tougher to win the
Derby than I imagined.
choice_data_list: But that's your dream, isn't it?
But that's your dream, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha, well... After running this race, I'm feeling
more motivated than ever!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It really hit me! I want to be faster than anyone
else and lead the pack!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So I'm gonna get even better! I've got to get
faster and faster...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Because I want to win.
choice_data_list: I'll lead you to victory as the favorite!
I'll lead you to victory as the favorite!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Haha, I'm gonna hold you to that, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Seriously though, that might feel pretty good.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I'll go out there with everyone's eyes on me like
today... I'll face them head-on... and I'll snatch
victory out from under their noses!)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume on TV
text_block_list.text:
"Since I was born an Umamusume, I always felt it
was my calling to become a Derby champion."

text_block_list.name: Interview Transcript
text_block_list.text:
"For us Umamusume, there's one title that we all
dream of acquiring."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I am an Umamusume, after all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so tomorrow is a day off, but we'll get
stuck into training the day after that.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Have a good night, Trainer. Sweet dreams.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, winning as the favorite? You've got pretty
high hopes for me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh—whoa?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... That was a close call! It'd be super
embarrassing if I got injured by being careless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "If it matters to you, it matters to me, too."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "If it matters to you, it matters to me, too."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
When we first started, you supported me in
continuing my part-time work despite my training
obligations.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Now, I want to fulfill my side of the bargain and
make your dream come true too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: So let's make this Derby ours, Trainer.
